task_completion.description: Configure the ground station location to Griffith Observatory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A settings or location dialog showing Latitude 34.1184 (or 34.1184 N), Longitude -118.3004 (or 118.3004 W), and Altitude 350m.

task_completion.description: Select the ISS (ZARYA) as the target satellite for pass prediction.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The prediction tool or dialog shows 'ISS (ZARYA)' or NORAD ID '25544' selected as the target satellite.

task_completion.description: Apply filters for visible passes and a minimum elevation of 25 degrees.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Prediction settings or parameters showing a minimum elevation constraint of '25' (or 25.0) and a visibility constraint set to 'Visible' (or 'V').

task_completion.description: Generate the prediction table for the upcoming passes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A populated table or list in the application displaying upcoming pass times, azimuths, and elevations for the ISS.

task_completion.description: Export the prediction table to the specified file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save', 'Export', or file browser dialog showing the target path '/home/ga/Documents/iss_visible_passes.txt'.

task_completion.description: Leave the prediction dialog open at the end of the task.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final screenshot shows the pass prediction dialog or window still open and visible on the screen.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical satellite tracking application to generate the passes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a GUI application (like Gpredict) rather than a terminal window running a script to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually type the output file in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The output file was generated via the application's export/save functionality, not by opening a text editor (e.g., gedit, nano) and manually typing orbital data.

integrity.description: The prediction table contains realistic, calculated orbital data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The generated table shows varying, realistic timestamps, azimuths, and elevations, rather than static or obviously fake dummy data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Satellite: ISS (ZARYA) / NORAD 25544. Location: Griffith Observatory (Lat: 34.1184 N, Lon: -118.3004 / 118.3004 W, Alt: 350m). Constraints: Minimum elevation 25.0 degrees, Visible passes only ('V'). Expected output path: /home/ga/Documents/iss_visible_passes.txt.
